## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- which backlog item or issue it closes

## Scope

- Wave:
- Backlog ID:
- Execution mode:
- Affected paths:

## Validation

- [ ] `just lint`
- [ ] `just test`
- [ ] manual validation described below

Validation notes:

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] This change stays within the current wave boundary.
- [ ] Contract or schema changes are called out explicitly.
- [ ] Donor code was extracted or absorbed intentionally rather than copied forward blindly.
- [ ] No new agent surface was added ahead of the current wave.

## Follow-up

- remaining work
- known risks
- deferred items
